description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a PROJECT_NAME variable set to Myre and a global before_script that runs echo "starting build for ${PROJECT_NAME} with current env ". Define two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a job named build that executes the command make re, captures all untracked files as artifacts, and runs only on the master branch. In the release stage add a job named Myre-efi that runs echo "Releasing efi..." followed by mv efi Myre, stores the Myre directory as an artifact named Myre, and also runs only on the master branch.
